title: Surume Is Tamed
description: On pages 5–8, this part follows Unknown person #1, Narrator, Nami, Franky, Luffy, Zoro, Sanji. The core story beat is surume is tamed.
scene: The scene centers on surume is tamed, with Unknown person #1, Narrator, Nami, Franky, Luffy, Zoro, Sanji driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's coming this way yummy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Gear "3"

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's too big!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quit it, you two!!! Big attacks will just break the bubble!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're Dodging it!! Chicken voyage!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Franky!! Let's use the coup de burst to charge straight into the downward current!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It should let us get away!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No... I considered that, but there's just one problem!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: The coup de burst and the Goon-hou are both weapons that fire large quantities of air. But right now, we are underwater!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our supply of air is limited!! If we start shooting it around, the bubble around the ship will shrink!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Of course...!! But then... what now?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't do anything!! Let's just fight it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: don't do that, Luffy!! You'll break the bubble!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you want to fight it that bad... then I'll lend you a hand, straw hat luffy!!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: If I don't help 'em out, these idiots will get us all killed!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: That should do it!! This is called Instant Flutter-kick coating!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What the...?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's basically like a diving suit!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You listening?! This rope will be your one and only lifeline!! All you gotta do is leap straight out of the ship...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...and you'll be able to do battle all you like without having to worry about damaging your vessel!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahhh him!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't stick your nose in where it's not wanted!! We already decided to get out of here!! This is going to mean we end up fighting it instead!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've been saying we should run since I first saw that thing!! It's that captain of yours who won't listen to a word of it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's going to go wild either way, so better outside the ship than on board it, am I right?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Okay!! You go for it, Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Go as far as you want!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you're going to fight, then stay away from the ship, all right?! I mean it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This rope sure is a pain...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ehh?! Hold on -!! You can't go leaping out without a lifeline!! You won't be able to get back!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: O!! Nami-san is worrying about me... worrying about... BMMPH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Buy some time for me, okay, you guys?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Then I'll take it out with a big one!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Not if I take it out first!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No! You'd just slice it up!! We're going to keep that octopus!! It's mine!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But it's still coming for UUUS!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Franky

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Rocket launcher!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AaaaaahH!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That blasted it away!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's what I call fire- power!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: No - there is still another tentacle coming!!

summary: Surume Is Tamed. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
